log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Tiefling — Iron Concentration --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:13+4=17 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Tiefling — Iron Concentration (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Tiefling — Iron Concentration
→ Bite: [d20:16+10=26 vs AC 14] HIT! 17 damage. Tiefling — Iron Concentration HP: 50/67
→ Bite: [d20:18+10=28 vs AC 14] HIT! 19 damage. Tiefling — Iron Concentration HP: 31/67
→ Bite: [d20:6+10=16 vs AC 14] HIT! 24 damage. Tiefling — Iron Concentration HP: 7/67
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Tiefling — Iron Concentration --- HP: 7/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (7/67). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Tiefling — Iron Concentration is affected by Greater Invisibility.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Tiefling — Iron Concentration (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Tiefling — Iron Concentration
→ Bite: [d20:13+10=23 vs AC 14] HIT! 15 damage. Tiefling — Iron Concentration HP: -8/67
→ Concentration save: [d20(ADV):20+8=28 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
